lines.text: I don't need a translation for this! I know what it means! It's content and saying thank you to us.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language

lines.text: Uh-oh! The module is starting to throw errors. Seems like compatibility is still an issue. Anyway, let's uninstall it for now. I'm pretty surprised that it ran smoothly for this long.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language

lines.text: The logic of my module is still straightforward. My understanding of Terminal Technology is no match for those officially trained researchers.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language

lines.text: Thank you. It took me a great effort to develop a module like this.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language

lines.text: You're right. The most important thing for a scientist is trial and error. Great success is built on failure!
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language

lines.text: Thank you for helping me gather this data. I'll analyze it thoroughly and try to find a way to improve the module.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language

lines.text: Let's do it again sometime. I'll speed up the development of translation modules for other animals, and they'll surely blow you away, hehe!
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language

lines.text: Are they mocking us?
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language

lines.text: According to the information I've looked up, aside from Star Flakes, other fried foods are also very appealing to them.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language

lines.text: As the Gray Crested Gulls enjoy stealing others' food, they are also known as "Pirate Gulls".
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language

lines.text: Yes. They are frequently spotted around "wharves" and places where potato fries are sold.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language

lines.text: Why is the module freezing? I'd better uninstall it for now. Seems like there is no storage on your Pangu Terminal.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language

lines.text: Ah-choo, ah-choo, I need to hurry back and warm myself up. See you next time.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language

lines.text: Sorry, that's how I set it.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: Don't you think it's more interesting and understandable this way?
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: From a researcher's standpoint, tail loss in Green Rabbits is considered a natural aspect of their metabolism. However, for them, the tail serves as a criterion to distinguish beauty from ugliness. Quite intriguing.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: All animals want to "select high-quality mates," as it serves as a form of survival strategy.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: Green Rabbits feed on grass and their tail glands play an important role in metabolizing toxins. When toxins accumulate to a certain extent, it manifests as "tail loss."
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: But I didn't anticipate that they would be so disheartened because of this reason...
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: Well, when I was optimizing the module, I introduced human thinking logic to it this time.
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: And! I, myself, am the sampler of human thinking logic. Don't you think the translation is more vivid?
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language

lines.text: Farewell! I'll go back to write the report. See you next time!
lines.quest_name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language
